text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On the day of her first Classic race, the Satsuki
Sho, Gold Ship is beside herself. Apparently, she's
furious a race named after May on the old
Japanese calendar would take place in April.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In a wildly unexpected turn, Gold Ship swears to
win the Satsuki Sho and rename it "Uzuki Sho" for
April when she does.
